Identity.Name: StingDisciplineCodes
Identity.Definition: Discipline codes for the first segment (DISC) of the STING 8-segment ISO 19650 tag. Based on the CIBSE / Uniclass 2015 discipline taxonomy extended with healthcare-domain disciplines (Healthcare, Medical Gas, Radiation Protection) introduced in the STING Healthcare Pack.

Governance.StandardsBasis: CIBSE Building Services Discipline Taxonomy; Uniclass 2015 (table Co); ISO 19650-2; STING Healthcare Pack (Phases H-1..H-30)

Value.Definition: Architectural — building fabric, finishes, fenestration, internal walls, doors, windows. Uniclass Co disciplines: Architectural design.
Electrical — power distribution, lighting, low voltage. Excludes communications / fire alarm / security (see LV).
Fire Protection — sprinklers, suppression, alarm panels, AOV, smoke control, fire-fighting water supply.
Civil / Geotechnical — site, drainage, external works, ground engineering. Maps to Uniclass G classification.

Healthcare — clinical equipment, clinical-room design, healthcare planning. Introduced in STING Healthcare Pack. Used for elements that don't fall cleanly into M/E/P but are clinical in nature (bedheads, anti-ligature fittings, observation lines, clinical sinks).
Low Voltage / Communications — data, voice, AV, nurse call, CCTV, access control, building management telemetry. Includes ELV / Cat 5/6/7/8 + fibre.
Mechanical — HVAC, ventilation, heating, cooling, mechanical plant. Uniclass Ss systems: Ss_55 HVAC.

Medical Gas — HTM 02-01 piped medical gas + vacuum systems: O2, N2O, air, vacuum, AGSS, entonox. Introduced in STING Healthcare Pack. Distinct from M (mechanical air) because of separate regulatory regime + verification protocols (NFPA 99 / HTM 02-01).
Plumbing / Public Health — domestic water, soil and waste, gas, rainwater. Uniclass Ss systems: Ss_50 hot/cold water; Ss_55 sanitary.

Radiation Protection — NCRP 147 / IPEM 75 shielding, MRI Faraday cages, controlled / supervised zone boundaries, lead-equivalent walls and viewing windows. Introduced in STING Healthcare Pack. Requires QE_Radiation signoff (see StingSignoffRoles).
Structural — load-bearing walls, columns, beams, slabs, foundations, bracing, rebar.
Unknown / not yet assigned — sentinel value for tags whose discipline cannot be derived (typically Stage 1-2 work; IDS fails this value at Stage 4+).
Wildcard — used ONLY in DrawingRoutingRule predicates (disciplineMatches) and workflow conditions. Never written onto a tagged element. IDS skips this value during element-level validation.
